prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical smartphone photo of a calm young East Asian woman sitting at a dimly lit upscale restaurant table at night, viewed from slightly above chest level in a candid social-media style. She has long messy black hair with wispy bangs and loose face-framing strands, soft glossy makeup, large reflective eyes, and a serene slightly melancholic expression while resting her right cheek on her right fist and looking directly into the camera. She wears a pale pink spaghetti-strap camisole and delicate bracelets on her right wrist, including pearl beads, gold chain details, and small black clover charms. Her left hand holds a bright yellow phone case covered in black doodle-style signatures at the lower left edge of the frame, as if taking or checking a selfie. The restaurant background contains exactly 8 notable visible objects: 1 dark green curtain on the left hanging from a metal rod, 1 textured gray concrete wall, 1 strip of exposed brick on the far right, 2 warm gold table lamps, 2 empty wine glasses on white tablecloths, and 1 small orange flower arrangement in the rear right. Use moody cinematic mixed lighting with warm candlelamp glow from the tables and a cool violet-blue cast across her face and skin, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, subtle film grain, natural lens distortion, and high detail. Frame her from mid-torso upward, centered slightly right, with intimate restaurant ambience, no text overlay, no watermark, no extra fingers, and no distorted jewelry or glassware.
